description_long: This modern bungalow features a flat roof design with multiple levels, including a rooftop terrace adorned with greenery and outdoor seating. The facade is characterized by large floor-to-ceiling windows, providing ample natural light and a seamless connection between indoor and outdoor spaces. The exterior combines white and gray finishes with wood accents, and solar panels are visible on the main roof. The property is surrounded by a manicured lawn, several trees, and a paved driveway leading to a garage. Outdoor living spaces include a patio with furniture and landscaped garden beds. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and sustainable elements.
description: A modern, multi-level bungalow with flat roofs, large windows, rooftop terrace, solar panels, and landscaped surroundings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, rooftop terrace, solar panels, driveway, and landscaped garden.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the multi-level structure, sloped driveway, and additional outdoor seating area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back garden, more trees, and the continuation of the flat roof and window design.
description_view_3: Opposite front angle showing the garage, driveway, and a different perspective of the rooftop terrace and garden.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and floor-to-ceiling glass panels
